title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 brings a native desktop application for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for server-based agent execution, enhanced web dashboard with admin controls, and improved model discovery through fuzzy search. The release includes local agent workflow capabilities, multi-surface support, and strengthened security measures.
